name: Slash Command
description: Block-type command palette triggered by / character. Provides quick access to insert different block types with keyboard navigation.

standard.description: Full command list with icons organized by category

filtered.description: Show only commands matching current filter

slots.categories: Grouped command sections (Text, Lists, Media, Advanced)
slots.commands: Individual command items with icon, name, description, shortcut

visual_brief: Floating dropdown menu that appears inline when '/' is typed at the start of a block. Contains a search input at the top (auto-focused, filtering as user types), and categorized command groups below: Text (paragraph, headings H1-H3, quote, callout), Lists (bullet, numbered, todo, toggle), Media (image, video, file, embed), and Advanced (code block, table, divider, math). Each command item shows an icon, name, and a brief description in muted text. The currently selected item has a highlighted background. Keyboard shortcut hints appear on the right. The filtered preset shows only matching commands when search text is entered.

responsive.mobile: Menu renders as a bottom sheet. Full-width items with larger touch targets. Category headers prominent. No keyboard shortcut hints.
responsive.tablet: Floating dropdown near the cursor. Standard item sizing.
responsive.desktop: Compact floating dropdown near the cursor. Full keyboard navigation with up/down arrows and Enter to select.
